Author: rail
Name: Aether Blackbox
Punchline: A visual replay of positions before death
Description: Replay positions and events before death. /abb to open; Connects to an external websocket relay for opt-in live sync mode (no PII sent).
Changelog:
v7.45.3: phase 2 detection hack, live sync fixes
v7.45.2:fix for zero size objects, ping icon, xml be gone
v2.1.1:export fixes
v2.1.0: Added grid options, new placeable shapes/icons, and optimized toolbar UI.
v2.0.2: fixes for web sync
v2.0.1: Fixed ghost clicks, canvas shifting, pet icons, capture config filters, empty pulls, and grouped pull history
v2.0.0: added drawing tools, export function, fixed memory leak, network disconnects, zone crash
